ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "company_logo" TEXT /* Logo of the company */,
  "company_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year when the company was founded */,
  "company_headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "company_size_revenue" TEXT /* Revenue size of the company */,
  "company_size_employees" TEXT /* Employee size of the company */,
  "company_employees_range" TEXT /* Detailed range of employees */,
  "company_revenue_range" TEXT /* Detailed range of revenue */,
  "company_blog_url" TEXT /* Blog URL of the company */,
  "company_industry_specialization" TEXT /* Specific areas of specialization within the industry */,
  "company_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the company's data */,
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry the company belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("industry_id") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "industry_description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "industry_parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent industry (for hierarchical classification) */,
  "industry_specialization" TEXT /* Specific areas of specialization within the industry */,
  "industry_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the industry's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leadership" (
  "leadership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leadership entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the leadership belongs to */,
  "leader_name" TEXT /* Name of the leader */,
  "leader_title" TEXT /* Title of the leader */,
  "leader_email" TEXT /* Email of the leader */,
  "leader_department" TEXT /* Department the leader belongs to */,
  "leader_start_date" TEXT /* Date the leader started their role */,
  "leader_end_date" TEXT /* Date the leader ended their role (if applicable) */,
  "leader_bio" TEXT /* Brief bio of the leader */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leadership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leadership_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "addresses" (
  "address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each address entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the address belongs to */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "address2" TEXT /* Secondary address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City the company is located in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the company is located in */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the company is located in */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the company */,
  "address_type" TEXT /* Type of address (e.g., headquarters, branch, warehouse) */,
  "address_street_number" TEXT /* Street number of the address */,
  "address_street_name" TEXT /* Street name of the address */,
  "address_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the address */,
  "address_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_addresses_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phone_numbers" (
  "phone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phone number entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the phone number belongs to */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "fax" TEXT /* Fax number of the company */,
  "phone_type" TEXT /* Type of phone number (e.g., main, fax, support) */,
  "phone_extension" TEXT /* Extension of the phone number */,
  "phone_country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_phone_numbers_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_social_media" (
  "social_media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the social media belongs to */,
  "facebook_link" TEXT /* Facebook link of the company */,
  "linkedin_link" TEXT /* LinkedIn link of the company */,
  "twitter_link" TEXT /* Twitter link of the company */,
  "google_plus_link" TEXT /* Google+ link of the company */,
  "instagram_link" TEXT /* Instagram link of the company */,
  "youtube_link" TEXT /* YouTube link of the company */,
  "tiktok_link" TEXT /* TikTok link of the company */,
  "social_media_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_social_media_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "about_company" (
  "about_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each about entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the about page belongs to */,
  "about_description" TEXT /* About description of the company */,
  "company_mission" TEXT /* Mission statement of the company */,
  "company_vision" TEXT /* Vision statement of the company */,
  "company_values" TEXT /* Core values of the company */,
  "company_history" TEXT /* Brief history of the company */,
  "company_last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the about page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("about_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_about_company_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the company */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the company was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_os" TEXT /* Operating system used to access the data (e.g., Windows, macOS) */,
  "access_browser" TEXT /* Browser used to access the data (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
